abandon.en: They had to abandon the sinking ship.

absolute.en: I have absolute trust in my doctor.
absolute.zh: 我對我的醫生有絕對的信任。

absorb.en: A sponge can absorb a lot of water.

abstract.en: The painting is abstract and hard to understand.
abstract.zh: 這幅畫很抽象，不容易理解。

academic.en: She did well in her academic studies.

accent.en: He speaks English with a French accent.
accent.zh: 他說英語帶有法國口音。

acceptance.en: She received an acceptance letter from the college.
acceptance.zh: 她收到了大學的錄取通知。

access.en: Students have access to the library.

accidental.en: The fire was accidental, not on purpose.
accidental.zh: 這場火是意外，不是故意的。

accompany.en: Her mother accompanied her to the doctor.

accomplish.en: She accomplished her goal through hard work.

accountant.en: The accountant checked the company's money.
accountant.zh: 會計師核對了公司的帳目。

accuracy.en: The report was written with great accuracy.
accuracy.zh: 這份報告寫得非常準確。

accuse.en: They accused him of stealing the money.

acid.en: Lemon juice contains a mild acid.

acquaintance.en: He is just an acquaintance, not a close friend.
acquaintance.zh: 他只是個熟人，不是好朋友。

acquire.en: She acquired new skills at her job.
acquire.zh: 她在工作中學到了新技能。

adapt.en: It takes time to adapt to a new school.

addict.en: He is a video game addict.

adequate.en: We have adequate food for the trip.
adequate.zh: 我們有足夠的食物可以旅行。

adjust.en: Please adjust your seat before driving.
adjust.zh: 開車前請調整你的座椅。

admiration.en: I have great admiration for my teacher.

admission.en: Admission to the museum is free today.

adopt.en: They decided to adopt a stray dog.
adopt.zh: 他們決定收養一隻流浪狗。

agency.en: She booked the trip through a travel agency.
agency.zh: 她透過旅行社預訂了行程。

agent.en: The travel agent helped us plan the tour.
agent.zh: 旅行社的業務幫我們規劃行程。

aggressive.en: The dog became aggressive when scared.
aggressive.zh: 那隻狗害怕時變得有攻擊性。

agreeable.en: We spent an agreeable afternoon in the garden.
agreeable.zh: 我們在花園度過了一個愉快的下午。

alcohol.en: Drinking too much alcohol is unhealthy.

alert.en: Stay alert while crossing the busy road.
alert.zh: 過繁忙的馬路時要保持警覺。

allowance.en: He saves part of his weekly allowance.
allowance.zh: 他把每週零用錢存下一部分。

alternative.en: Is there an alternative to this plan?
alternative.zh: 這個計畫有別的替代方案嗎？

ambiguous.en: Her answer was ambiguous and unclear.
ambiguous.zh: 她的回答模稜兩可，不清楚。

ambitious.en: She is ambitious and works very hard.
ambitious.zh: 她很有企圖心，工作非常努力。

analysis.en: The doctor did a careful analysis of the blood.

analyze.en: We need to analyze the data first.
analyze.zh: 我們需要先分析這些數據。

ancestor.en: Our ancestors lived in this village.
ancestor.zh: 我們的祖先住在這個村莊。

annoy.zh: 巨大的噪音惹惱了大家。

annual.en: The school holds an annual sports day.
annual.zh: 學校每年舉辦一次運動會。

anxiety.en: She felt anxiety before the big exam.

apparent.en: It was apparent that she was tired.

applicant.en: Each applicant filled out a form.
applicant.zh: 每位申請人都填了一張表格。

application.en: She sent her job application by email.
application.zh: 她用電子郵件寄出求職申請。

appoint.en: I made an appointment with the dentist.

appreciation.en: She showed appreciation for the gift.
appreciation.zh: 她對這份禮物表達了感謝。

appropriate.en: Wear appropriate clothes for the interview.

approval.en: The plan needs the principal's approval.
approval.zh: 這個計畫需要校長的批准。

aquarium.en: We saw colorful fish at the aquarium.
aquarium.zh: 我們在水族館看到了色彩繽紛的魚。

arch.en: The old bridge has a stone arch.

arise.en: Problems may arise if we are careless.
arise.zh: 如果我們不小心，問題可能會出現。

arms.en: The soldiers were trained to use arms.

artificial.en: The drink has an artificial flavor.

ashamed.en: He felt ashamed of his mistake.
ashamed.zh: 他為自己的錯誤感到羞愧。

aspect.en: We discussed every aspect of the plan.
aspect.zh: 我們討論了這個計畫的每個方面。

aspirin.en: She took an aspirin for her headache.
aspirin.zh: 她吃了一顆阿斯匹靈治頭痛。

assemble.en: The students assembled in the hall.

assembly.en: We have a school assembly every Monday.
assembly.zh: 我們每週一有全校集會。

assign.en: The teacher assigned us a writing task.
assign.zh: 老師指派了我們一項寫作作業。

assistance.en: She offered assistance to the lost tourist.
assistance.zh: 她向迷路的遊客提供協助。

associate.en: We associate summer with the beach.
associate.zh: 我們把夏天和海灘聯想在一起。

association.zh: 他加入了一個運動協會。

assurance.en: He gave us his assurance that it was safe.
assurance.zh: 他向我們保證那是安全的。

assure.en: I assure you that everything will be fine.
assure.zh: 我向你保證一切都會沒事。

athletic.en: She has an athletic build from years of sport.
athletic.zh: 多年運動讓她有運動員般的體格。

atmosphere.en: The restaurant has a warm atmosphere.
atmosphere.zh: 這家餐廳有溫馨的氣氛。

atom.en: Everything is made of tiny atoms.
atom.zh: 萬物都是由微小的原子構成的。

attach.en: Please attach the file to your email.
attach.zh: 請把檔案附加在你的電子郵件裡。

attraction.en: The waterfall is a popular tourist attraction.
attraction.zh: 這座瀑布是熱門的觀光景點。

audio.en: The audio quality of the video is poor.

authentic.zh: 我們吃了道地的義大利菜。

authority.en: The police have the authority to stop cars.

autobiography.en: She wrote an autobiography about her life.
autobiography.zh: 她寫了一本關於自己人生的自傳。

autograph.en: The fans asked the star for an autograph.

baid.en: The teacher explained how to use the word in a sentence.
baid.zh: 老師說明如何在句子中使用這個字。

ballet.en: She has studied ballet since she was five.
ballet.zh: 她從五歲就開始學芭蕾。

bandage.en: The nurse put a bandage on his cut.
bandage.zh: 護士在他的傷口上包紮繃帶。

bankrupt.en: The company went bankrupt last year.

bargain.en: These shoes were a real bargain.

barrier.en: Language can be a barrier when traveling.
barrier.zh: 旅行時語言可能是個障礙。

basin.en: She washed her face in the basin.

battery.en: My phone battery is almost dead.
battery.zh: 我手機的電池快沒電了。

beggar.en: The beggar asked for some coins.

behavior.zh: 他在學校的行為改善了。

bin.en: Throw the trash in the bin.

biography.en: I read a biography of a famous scientist.
biography.zh: 我讀了一位著名科學家的傳記。

biology.en: We studied plants in biology class.
biology.zh: 我們在生物課研究植物。

blade.en: The knife has a sharp blade.

blend.en: Blend the fruit to make a smoothie.

blessing.en: Good health is a great blessing.

blink.en: She blinked in the bright light.

bloom.en: The roses bloom in early summer.

blossom.en: The cherry trees blossom in spring.

boast.en: He likes to boast about his new car.

bond.en: There is a strong bond between the sisters.
bond.zh: 姊妹之間有深厚的情感。

bounce.en: The ball bounced off the wall.

bridegroom-groom.en: The bridegroom waited for the bride.

broke.en: I am broke until I get paid.
broke.zh: 在領薪水之前我身無分文。

broom.en: She swept the floor with a broom.

brutal.en: The weather was brutal during the storm.
brutal.zh: 暴風雨期間天氣非常惡劣。

bulletin.en: Check the bulletin board for the schedule.

burglar.en: A burglar broke into the house at night.
burglar.zh: 竊賊在夜裡闖入這棟房子。

cabinet.en: The cups are kept in the kitchen cabinet.
cabinet.zh: 杯子放在廚房的櫥櫃裡。

calculation.en: My calculation showed the right answer.
calculation.zh: 我的計算得出了正確的答案。

calorie.en: This snack is high in calories.

campaign.en: They started a campaign to clean the beach.
campaign.zh: 他們發起了一場淨灘活動。

candidate.en: She is the best candidate for the job.
candidate.zh: 她是這份工作最合適的人選。

cane.en: The old man walked with a cane.
cane.zh: 那位老人拄著拐杖走路。

canoe.en: We paddled a canoe down the river.
canoe.zh: 我們划獨木舟順流而下。

capacity.en: The hall has a capacity of 500 people.
capacity.zh: 這個大廳可容納五百人。

capital-2.en: He needs capital to start his business.

capitalist.en: The capitalist invested in many companies.
capitalist.zh: 那位資本家投資了許多公司。

cargo.en: The ship carried cargo across the ocean.
cargo.zh: 這艘船載著貨物橫越大洋。

carrier.en: The mail carrier delivers letters daily.

carve.en: He carved a bird out of wood.

catalogue.en: She looked through the clothing catalogue.

category.en: Sort the books into different categories.

cease.en: The rain finally ceased in the afternoon.

celebration.en: The whole town joined the celebration.
celebration.zh: 全鎮的人都加入了慶祝活動。

chamber.en: The king sat in a large chamber.
chamber.zh: 國王坐在一間大廳室裡。

characteristic.zh: 善良是她最主要的特質。

charity.en: She gave money to a children's charity.
charity.zh: 她捐錢給兒童慈善機構。

chemistry.en: We did an experiment in chemistry class.
chemistry.zh: 我們在化學課做了實驗。

cherish.en: I cherish the time with my family.
cherish.zh: 我珍惜和家人相處的時光。

choke.en: He almost choked on a fish bone.

circular.en: The table has a circular shape.

circumstance.en: We did our best under the circumstances.
circumstance.zh: 在那種情況下我們已盡了全力。

civilian.en: Many civilians lost their homes in the war.
civilian.zh: 許多平民在戰爭中失去了家園。

civilization.zh: 古文明建造了偉大的城市。

clarify.en: Could you clarify what you mean?
clarify.zh: 你能說清楚你的意思嗎？

clash.en: The two groups had a clash of opinions.

classification.en: The library uses a clear classification system.
classification.zh: 圖書館使用清楚的分類系統。

classify.zh: 我們把動物分成不同的類別。

claw.en: The cat scratched the post with its claws.

cliff.en: The house stands on a high cliff.
cliff.zh: 這棟房子立在高高的懸崖上。

clumsy.en: He is clumsy and often drops things.
clumsy.zh: 他笨手笨腳，常常掉東西。

coarse.en: The cloth felt coarse and rough.
coarse.zh: 這塊布摸起來又粗又糙。

code.en: She typed the secret code carefully.
code.zh: 她小心地輸入秘密代碼。

collapse.en: The old building collapsed in the earthquake.
collapse.zh: 那棟舊建築在地震中倒塌了。

colleague.en: She had lunch with a colleague.
colleague.zh: 她和一位同事一起吃午餐。

combination.en: The dish is a combination of sweet and sour.
combination.zh: 這道菜是甜與酸的結合。

comedy.en: We laughed a lot at the comedy.
comedy.zh: 看那部喜劇時我們笑了很多。

commander.zh: 指揮官下達了明確的命令。

comment.en: The teacher made a helpful comment.
comment.zh: 老師給了一個有幫助的評語。

communication.zh: 良好的溝通有助於團隊。

community.en: Our community held a clean-up day.
community.zh: 我們社區舉辦了打掃日。

companion.en: The dog was his faithful companion.
companion.zh: 那隻狗是他忠實的夥伴。

competitive.en: The job market is very competitive.

competitor.en: Each competitor ran as fast as they could.
competitor.zh: 每位參賽者都盡力快跑。

complicate.zh: 別把簡單的問題複雜化。

compose.en: She composed a song for the show.
compose.zh: 她為這場表演創作了一首歌。

composer.zh: 這位作曲家寫了優美的音樂。
